headline: Argentina's YPF awards Halliburton long-term unconventional completions contract
summary: Argentina's state oilcompany YPF has awarded U.S. oilfield services providerHalliburton a contract for long-term unconventional wellcompletion in the South American country, Halliburton said. ...

headline: YPF Awards Halliburton Multibillion-dollar Long-term Unconventional Completions Contract in Argentina
summary: HOUSTON, April 13, 2026--Halliburton (NYSE: HAL) announced today it was awarded a multibillion-dollar contract by YPF to provide bundled unconventional completions services in the Vaca Muerta, one of the world’s most prolific shale resources outside North America. The award, which resulted from a competitive process, establishes a dedicated, exclusive, and multi-year collaboration.

headline: Halliburton Wins Multibillion Dollar Award From YPF To Provide Bundled Unconventional Completions Services In The Vaca Muerta Shale Formation In Argentina
summary: Under the contract, Halliburton will utilize its ZEUS electric fracturing services in its first international deployment. The agreement also includes the OCTIV Auto Frac service, part of the OCTIV digital fracturing
